data.title: Vale Sets Samarco Dam Bill Estimate At $30B, BHP Faces UK's High Court
data.description: Vale estimates $30 billion in fines and compensation for 2015 dam collapse in Brazil, with a settlement under discussion. BHP faces separate lawsuit.

data.title: California's Squatter Laws Enable Tenancy Rights After Just 30 Days, Raising Concerns Among Property Owners About Housing Security
Alibaba, Nio, Baidu Stocks Decline Amid China's Rate Cuts: What's Going On?
data.description: Investors are assessing the impact of commercial bank rate cuts amid discussions that only government spending might revive the economy.

data.title: Donald Trump's Polymarket Odds Rise To 61.3% After McDonald's Appearance
data.description: Former President Donald Trump has a substantial lead over Vice President Kamala Harris in the 2024 US presidential election, with 61.3% odds of winning according to the Polymarket prediction market.

data.title: US Stocks Set To Open On A Mixed Note As Investors Await Earnings From Tesla, Boeing, GM And Others: Strategist Predicts Significant Gains In This Bull Market
data.description: U.S. stocks could see mixed start on Monday after 6-week gains. S&P 500 rises 10 of past 11 months, signaling bullish market.
